에베소서 3:1.content: For this cause I, Paul, am the prisoner of Christ Jesus on behalf of you Gentiles,

에베소서 3:2.content: if it is so that you have heard of the administration of that grace of God which was given me toward you,

에베소서 3:3.content: how that by revelation the mystery was made known to me, as I wrote before in few words,

에베소서 3:4.content: by which, when you read, you can perceive my understanding in the mystery of Christ,

에베소서 3:5.content: which in other generations was not made known to the children of men, as it has now been revealed to his holy apostles and prophets in the Spirit,

에베소서 3:6.content: that the Gentiles are fellow heirs and fellow members of the body, and fellow partakers of his promise in Christ Jesus through the Good News,

에베소서 3:7.content: of which I was made a servant according to the gift of that grace of God which was given me according to the working of his power.

에베소서 3:8.content: To me, the very least of all saints, was this grace given, to preach to the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ,

에베소서 3:9.content: and to make all men see what is the administration of the mystery which for ages has been hidden in God, who created all things through Jesus Christ,

에베소서 3:10.content: to the intent that now through the assembly the manifold wisdom of God might be made known to the principalities and the powers in the heavenly places,

에베소서 3:11.content: according to the eternal purpose which he accomplished in Christ Jesus our Lord.

에베소서 3:12.content: In him we have boldness and access in confidence through our faith in him.

에베소서 3:13.content: Therefore I ask that you may not lose heart at my troubles for you, which are your glory.

에베소서 3:14.content: For this cause, I bow my knees to the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,

에베소서 3:15.content: from whom every family in heaven and on earth is named,

에베소서 3:16.content: that he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, that you may be strengthened with power through his Spirit in the inner person,

에베소서 3:17.content: that Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith, to the end that you, being rooted and grounded in love,

에베소서 3:18.content: may be strengthened to comprehend with all the saints what is the width and length and height and depth,

에베소서 3:19.content: and to know Christ’s love which surpasses knowledge, that you may be filled with all the fullness of God.

에베소서 3:20.content: Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that works in us,

에베소서 3:21.content: to him be the glory in the assembly and in Christ Jesus to all generations forever and ever. Amen.
